title: Network Cloud-Served License
text: Network Cloud-Served License A network cloud-served license enables a Sentinel RMS License Manager (also called an RMS Server) to run concurrent licenses from a network location, synchronizing with the Sentinel Cloud Server to automatically extend and renew licenses. You are given an Entitlement ID when you register with Uniface. It enables you to activate and configure cloud-served licenses for the RMS Sentinel License Manager. For more information, see Sentinel RMS License Manager . To configure a network cloud-served license, see Configuring Network Cloud-Served Licenses . To return a network cloud-served license, see Returning Network Cloud-Served Licenses . Related Links Sentinel RMS License Manager Installing the Sentinel RMS License Manager on Windows The Sentinel Rights Management System (RMS) License Manager enforces and manages licenses for Uniface in multi-user environments. Uninstalling Sentinel RMS License Manager on Windows Installing the Sentinel RMS License Manager on Unix and Linux The Sentinel Rights Management System (RMS) License Manager (also known as the RMS Server) enforces and manages licenses for Uniface in multi-user environments. Uninstalling Sentinel RMS License Manager on Unix To uninstall the RMS License Manager, use the uninstall script that was created in the directory you specified during installation. You will be asked to return your license so that you can use it on a different machine. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
